THERE'S BAGS OF TRASH OUTSIDE OF THE CAN AND THE RECYCLING IS FULL AND OVERFLOWING. CALLER IS CONCERNED THAT RODENTS WILL SOON BE ATTRACTED TO THE MESS. CALLER SAYS THEY ARE SPANISH SPEAKING.  Additional Comments:

Type: Property Violations - Residential Complaint  Description:  Property at 730 Delaware Ave., Madison, TN 37115 appears vacant for several months. Power is on, but no yard maintenance is being done. Grass and shrubbery are overgrown, especially in the backyard, and the property is becoming an eyesore.  A white van occasionally visits for short periods, with an individual entering the home, which raises concern given the vacancy.  This is a corner lot where children frequently walk home from a nearby school. The overgrowth creates risk for rodents such as snakes and rats and presents a safety concern.  Requesting the owner be contacted and the property maintained, including cutting the grass and addressing upkeep, before this becomes a larger issue.  Additional Comments:

She had an enclosed sunroom that had a few broken windows.  She completely gutted her sunporch and drywalled the whole enclosure in.  She did not apply for a building permit to do this work.  She also did not put a door in the space for an exit.  In looking up codes, she should have a door installed.  Pictures are included.  Additional Comments:

records.legal: EXTERIOR REPAIR,OPEN STORAGE, JUNK, TRASH, DEBRIS,PARKING ON GRASS,UNLIC / INOP / ACCUMULATION MTR VEHICLES
records.description: Type: Property Violations - Dilapidated Structures  Description:  I believe the address is of the dilapidated property is 708 North 5th St. The house is in between the townhome 644 north 5th st and the house at 712 N 5th. Its painted white in front and the rest is green. The occupants have built structures in the back yard and connected to the back of the house that have been un sanitary from the beginning. I tried to give them time to finish the work and hopefully it would be acceptable when finished but the work seems to have stopped up to a year ago and is now degrading with time. The view from the street is bad enough but the view from the anywhere on the adjoining properties is terrible.  Additional Comments:
records._violation_type: EXTERIOR REPAIR,OPEN STORAGE, JUNK, TRASH, DEBRIS,PARKING ON GRASS,UNLIC / INOP / ACCUMULATION MTR VEHICLES
